listeners.purpose: Warms in-memory LRU cache with the 200 most-hit translations per active locale. Reduces DB round-trips on cold requests.
Enables the workspace's business_type default locales (usually en + native language of the workspace's country) as WorkspaceLocale rows.
Cascade delete via FK; this listener writes the compliance audit trail entry + emits count metric.

If workspace_locale.auto_translate=true AND localization.auto_translate feature enabled AND entitlement quota available: dispatch TranslateJob for this single key. Debounced 60s per (workspace, namespace, key, locale) to prevent stampedes.
Consumes 1 unit of localization.ai_translations.month for the workspace. Aggregated per hour to reduce entitlement write pressure.
When user.profile.preferred_locale changed, fire LocaleChanged event + invalidate any per-user translation caches.
